# Vendored Dependency: SceneNodePath

This directory contains a standalone copy of **SceneNodePath** to ensure this multiplayer addon works out-of-the-box without requiring users to download external dependencies.

* **Source:** [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/diejorscene_node_path)
* **Version:** 1.0.0
* **Commit Hash:** 6daa9930203e044c4f013f5e22db6c6254176da7
* **Vendored On:** March 12, 2026

**Note to Contributors:** Do not edit the files in this folder directly. Make changes in the parent repository and copy the updated files here.
